enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep devotion and the beauty of love through poetic lyrics.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and connection to spirituality.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the legendary voices of K.J. Yesudhas and K.S. Chitra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

The song was released on April 24, 1986.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Un Paarvayil from Amman Kovil Kizhakale is a soulful melody that encapsulates the essence of devotion and longing. It beautifully conveys the emotions of love and spirituality through its poetic lyrics and soothing composition. The collaboration of K.J. Yesudhas and K.S. Chitra adds a rich texture to the song, making it a timeless classic. This track evokes a sense of nostalgia, inviting listeners to reflect on their own spiritual journeys.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Paarvayil from Amman Kovil Kizhakale is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of devotion and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of K.J. Yesudhas and K.S. Chitra, this song transports listeners to a serene realm of emotions. Experience the magic of Ilaiyaraaja's composition that beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with soul-stirring music.
stanzaMeanings: I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze..(2)
I always think of you, I remember you with my thoughts.
I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze.
The melody that is played is a new tune, the rhythm that is played is a beautiful sound.
Like a sweet smile, it is a playful sound, it is a right turn that is present in the rhythm.
Until it exists, it gives and takes (2) my heart is like a peacock, I am lost day by day.
From forgetting, I have come to enjoy each day.
I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze.
I always think of you, I remember you with my thoughts.
I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze.
Everything I think is about the one who is my leader, what should I take next?
The bed is spread for you. The place is made for everything.
If I forget to think, I will fly alone (2) will the hidden face be revealed or will it remain closed?
From being present to being a feast, two hearts are united.
I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze.
I always think of you, I remember you with my thoughts.
I will write a thousand poems in your sight, I am the one in the breeze.
